data.title: NRG Energy, Inc. increases quarterly dividend to $0.475 per share, $1.90 per share annually, in line with target growth rate.
data.description: In Houston, NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NRG) disclosed a quarterly dividend of $0.475 per share, amounting to $1.90 yearly. This marks an 8% rise from last year and aligns with the firm's target annual dividend growth rate of 7-9% per share. Shareholders of NRG as of February 2, 2026, will receive this dividend on February 17, 2026. NRG is a well-known energy company.

data.title: BBWI investors affected by losses urged to contact Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP for securities fraud class action filed. Seek recovery for losses between June 4, 2024, and November 19, 2025.
data.description: If you suffered losses from investing in Bath & Body Works, Inc. (NYSE: BBWI) securities between June 4, 2024, and November 19, 2025, you may be eligible for recovery. A class action lawsuit has been filed regarding securities fraud involving BBWI. Investors who purchased or acquired BBWI securities during this period are seeking compensation for their losses.

data.title: Toews Corporation launches Hedged Nasdaq-100® ETF via '351 ETF Exchange', image removed from release.
data.description: Toews Corporation has announced the launch of a new Hedged Nasdaq-100® ETF, which aims to address the tax gap. The ETF will be seeded by the innovative '351 ETF Exchange'. The news was released on 21-Jan-2026, with Toews Agility Shares Hedged Nasdaq-100 ETF being the focal point.

data.title: Elcora completes initial phase of private placement. Target audience: Canadian investors only.
data.description: This press release is meant for distribution exclusively in Canada and is not intended for distribution to United States newswire services or dissemination in the United States.

data.title: Elon Musk endorses solar energy at 2026 World Economic Forum, drives rally in sector. CSIQ stock climbs. Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: At the 2026 World Economic Forum in Davos, Elon Musk emphasized solar energy as a pivotal component in the global power transition. Following his endorsement, the solar energy sector experienced a surge, with Canadian Solar, Inc. (CSIQ) stocks notably rising. Other solar stocks such as First Solar, Inc. (FSLR), Sunrun, Inc. (RUN), Ascent Solar Technologies, Inc. (ASTI), and SolarEdge Technologies, Inc. were also positively impacted. For more details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Blue Moon Metals to start trading on Nasdaq as BMM on Jan 26; Peter Madsen appointed to board.
data.description: Blue Moon Metals Inc. revealed today that its common shares, traded on TSXV as MOON, Z as BMM, and Frankfurt as 8SX0, will start trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market on Monday, January 26th, under the symbol "BMM."

data.title: DTC SEO Agency in Austin expands ecommerce search offerings to include AI Search, AEO, and GEO, founded in 2021.
data.description: An Austin-founded ecommerce SEO firm, DTC SEO Agency, has broadened its search optimization services in 2026 to include AI Search, Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) for ecommerce brands. Established in 2021, the agency is enhancing its offerings to meet the evolving demands of the market.

data.title: Imagine Devices Inc. partners with Neotech Products to enhance neonatal care on Jan 23, 2026.
data.description: In Valencia, California and Austin, Texas, on January 23, 2026, Imagine Devices Inc. revealed a significant collaboration with Neotech Products. Imagine Devices, a company specializing in medical devices for neonatal and pediatric critical care, joined forces with Neotech Products, a prominent player in neonatal and pediatric medical industries. This partnership aims to leverage the strengths of both companies to enhance care for newborns and children.

data.title: Winter storm hitting US, 160M people affected; travelers advised on insurance amid disruptions.
data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on January 23, 2026, it has been reported that over 160 million individuals are preparing for the arrival of the most severe winter storm so far this season. The storm is anticipated to bring freezing rain, significant snowfall, and temperatures dropping below zero. Various major cities and airports are likely to experience disruptions due to the extreme weather conditions. Travelers are advised to...

data.title: Stellar (XLM) advocates for blockchain-TradFi integration at Davos 2026, highlighting protocols for accountability, privacy, and compliance.
data.description: Stellar (XLM) has discussed the potential for code-based blockchain protocols to provide essential features like accountability, privacy, and compliance that are necessary for traditional payment networks. This highlights the importance of embracing new technologies to enhance the functionality and security of financial transactions.

data.title: Dow drops 350 points; Applied Digital jumps on AI factory news. The article covers live updates.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a significant drop of 350 points. Applied Digital saw a remarkable surge following news about an AI factory, while another stock witnessed a rocket-like rise. The market update featured a live coverage discussing the sharp decline in the Dow Jones index and the impressive performance of Applied Digital due to the mystery factory news.

data.title: Citigroup plans more layoffs in March, targets senior roles after 1,000 cuts this month. Aims to cut 20,000 roles by 2026.
data.description: Citigroup Inc. is gearing up for more employee layoffs in March after around 1,000 job cuts recently. The upcoming layoffs will mainly impact managing directors and senior staff in various business areas as the bank aims to streamline operations as part of a larger restructuring initiative. This is in line with the bank's plan announced two years ago to cut 20,000 jobs by 2026. Currently, Citigroup has approximately 227,000 employees.
